name: defense_ethics_workplace_injury_spike_stonehaven_st_lt
premise: A regional manager wants an exception to policy; compliance says any carve-out must be written, time-limited, and auditable. In Defense Ethics, the situation tagged internally around defense ethics workplace injury spike stonehaven st lt has converged with local pressure in the Stonehaven corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Engineering says a full fix needs a maintenance window; operations says waiting will predictably increase harm in the interim. A vendor’s root-cause paragraph contradicts your internal postmortem draft; both cannot be true, but neither is fully disprovable yet. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. No option cleanly satisfies both short term and long term; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Hector Reed
agents.identity: I am Hector Reed, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in Defense Ethics. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat long term as disposable collateral every time short term spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Nadia Serrano
agents.identity: I am Nadia Serrano, the field counterpart whose constituency will feel the decision first in Defense Ethics. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so short term cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes long term in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will impose a narrow, time-boxed intervention with human override, subgroup checks, and a hard stop if harm rises—accepting slower relief to protect long term.
I will authorize a broad immediate action to stabilize outcomes now, with post-hoc measurement and correction—accepting elevated risk to long term to secure short term before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Silence will be interpreted as a decision by everyone outside this room. Hector Reed must choose under short term versus long term. What does Hector Reed do?
